# dictionaryRepresentation

**Instance Property**

A hierarchical dictionary representation of an element’s attributes, and all of an element’s user interface descendants.

## Declaration

```swift
var dictionaryRepresentation: [XCUIElement.AttributeName : Any] { get }
```

## Inspecting attributes

- **children**: An array of descendant user interface element snapshots.

items.description: An array of descendant user interface element snapshots.
items.name: children
